steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the linear table
steps.content: Enter the table as $x_1=[0,1,2]$ and $y_1=[29,32,35]$. Then type the linear regression row $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=3$ and $b=29$, so the function is $f(x)=3x+29$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$f(x)=3x+29$': gives $f(0)=29$, $f(1)=32$, and $f(2)=35$. Matches all rows.
  • Choice B — '$f(x)=29x+32$': $f(0)=32$, not 29. Eliminated.
  • Choice C — '$f(x)=35x+29$': $f(1)=64$, not 32. Eliminated.
  • Choice D — '$f(x)=32x+35$': $f(0)=35$, not 29. Eliminated.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
